---
title: "Team assessor"
subtitle: "Compare a custom team against the optimal selection"
format: html
---

# Configuration

```{julia}
#| echo: true
#| output: false
using Velogames, DataFrames, Statistics, MarkdownTables

# Race — must match the oneday predictor config
race_name = "milano-sanremo"
race_year = 2026

# Fallback config — only used if no archived prediction exists
racehash = ""  # VG startlist hash filter (leave empty for all riders)
betfair_market_id = ""
oracle_url = ""
qualitative_youtube_url = ""
qualitative_json_file = ""
n_resamples = 500
history_years = 5
domestique_discount = 0.3
risk_aversion = 0.5
max_per_team = 0
excluded_riders = String[]

# Simulation noise (nothing = Gaussian, integer = Student's t degrees of freedom)
simulation_df = 5

# Breakaway data
breakaway_dir = joinpath(DEFAULT_ARCHIVE_DIR, "pcs_breakaways")

# Cache
race_cache = CacheConfig(joinpath(homedir(), ".velogames_cache"), 6)

# Helper
md_table(df) = print(sprint(show, MIME("text/markdown"), markdown_table(df)))
```

# Your team

List the riders in your custom team. Names must match VG rider names exactly.

```{julia}
#| echo: true
#| output: false
my_team = [
    "Tadej Pogacar",
    "Mathieu Van Der Poel",
    "Filippo Ganna",
    "Tim Marsman",
    "Manuele Tarozzi",
    "Gabriele Raccagni"
]
my_keys = createkey.(my_team)
```

# Prediction

```{julia}
#| output: asis

config = suppress_output() do
    setup_race(race_name, race_year; cache_config=race_cache)
end
scoring = get_scoring(config.category > 0 ? config.category : 2)

# Try loading archived prediction from the oneday predictor (no temporal leakage)
archived_prediction = !isempty(config.pcs_slug) ?
                      load_race_snapshot("predictions", config.pcs_slug, config.year) : nothing
used_archive = false

if archived_prediction !== nothing && nrow(archived_prediction) > 0
    predicted = archived_prediction
    used_archive = true

    # Ensure team data is present (legacy archives may lack it)
    if !hasproperty(predicted, :team)
        vg_riders = suppress_output() do
            getvgriders(config.current_url; cache_config=race_cache)
        end
        predicted = leftjoin(predicted, vg_riders[:, [:riderkey, :team]], on=:riderkey)
        predicted.team = coalesce.(predicted.team, "Unknown")
    end

    # Reconstruct model's optimal team from archived chosen column
    optimal_team = if :chosen in propertynames(predicted)
        filter(:chosen => ==(true), predicted)
    else
        sol = build_model_oneday(predicted, 6, :expected_vg_points, :cost; totalcost=100)
        sol !== nothing ? filter(row -> sol[row.riderkey] > 0.5, predicted) : DataFrame()
    end
else
    # No archive — run fresh prediction (may have VG season points leakage if race is past)
    qualitative_df = nothing
    if !isempty(qualitative_youtube_url)
        try
            riders_tmp = suppress_output() do
                getvgriders(config.current_url; cache_config=race_cache)
            end
            qualitative_df = get_qualitative_auto(
                qualitative_youtube_url,
                String.(riders_tmp.rider),
                race_name,
                string(Dates.today()),
            )
        catch e
            @warn "Failed to extract qualitative intelligence: $e"
        end
    elseif !isempty(qualitative_json_file)
        try
            qualitative_df = load_qualitative_file(qualitative_json_file)
        catch e
            @warn "Failed to load qualitative file: $e"
        end
    end

    predicted, optimal_team, _ = suppress_output() do
        solve_oneday(config;
            racehash=racehash,
            history_years=history_years,
            betfair_market_id=betfair_market_id,
            oracle_url=oracle_url,
            n_resamples=n_resamples,
            excluded_riders=excluded_riders,
            qualitative_df=qualitative_df,
            domestique_discount=domestique_discount,
            risk_aversion=risk_aversion,
            max_per_team=max_per_team,
            breakaway_dir=breakaway_dir,
            simulation_df=simulation_df)
    end
end

prediction_ok = nrow(predicted) > 0

# Compute breakaway rates from PCS data
b_rates, b_sectors = if isdir(breakaway_dir)
    try
        bdf = load_pcs_breakaway_stats(breakaway_dir)
        compute_breakaway_rates(bdf, String.(predicted.riderkey))
    catch
        Float64[], Float64[]
    end
else
    Float64[], Float64[]
end

# Regenerate simulation draws from strength estimates (fast, <1s)
sim_vg_points = if prediction_ok && :strength in propertynames(predicted) && :uncertainty in propertynames(predicted)
    simulate_vg_draws(predicted, scoring; n_draws=n_resamples,
        breakaway_rates=b_rates, breakaway_mean_sectors=b_sectors,
        simulation_df=simulation_df)
else
    nothing
end

# Compute expected VG points from sim draws if not already present (legacy archives)
if sim_vg_points !== nothing && !hasproperty(predicted, :expected_vg_points)
    predicted[!, :expected_vg_points] = [mean(@view sim_vg_points[i, :]) for i in 1:nrow(predicted)]
end

if prediction_ok
    source = used_archive ? "archived prediction (pre-race)" : "fresh prediction"
    print("""
**$(titlecase(config.name)) $(config.year)** — $(nrow(predicted)) riders, $(source)

""")
    if !used_archive
        print("""
::: {.callout-note}
Using fresh prediction. If this race has already happened, VG season points may include results from this race. Run the oneday predictor before the race to archive a clean prediction.
:::

""")
    end
else
    print("""
::: {.callout-warning}
Prediction failed — no riders returned. Check race configuration (name, year, racehash) and try again. The race may have already finished and VG data may no longer be available.
:::

""")
end
```

# Your team assessment

```{julia}
#| output: asis

if !prediction_ok
    print("*Skipped — prediction not available.*\n")
else

    # Match riders by name
    my_selection = filter(row -> row.riderkey in my_keys, predicted)

    # Check for unmatched riders
    matched_keys = Set(my_selection.riderkey)
    for (name, key) in zip(my_team, my_keys)
        if key ∉ matched_keys
            print("""
    ::: {.callout-warning}
    **$(name)** not found in the rider list. Check the spelling matches VG exactly.
    :::

    """)
        end
    end

    if nrow(my_selection) > 0
        my_cost = sum(my_selection.cost)
        my_evg = sum(my_selection.expected_vg_points)

        print("""
    **Total cost:** $(my_cost) / 100 credits | **Expected VG points:** $(round(my_evg, digits=1)) | **Budget remaining:** $(100 - my_cost)

    """)

        display_cols = [:rider, :team, :cost, :expected_vg_points, :selection_frequency, :strength, :uncertainty]
        display_cols = filter(c -> c in propertynames(my_selection), display_cols)

        my_display = my_selection[:, display_cols]
        round_numeric_columns!(my_display)
        clean_team_names!(my_display, [:team])
        md_table(sort(my_display, :expected_vg_points, rev=true))
        print("\n")
    end

end # prediction_ok
```

# Optimal team

```{julia}
#| output: asis
if !prediction_ok
    print("*Skipped — prediction not available.*\n")
elseif nrow(optimal_team) > 0
    opt_cost = sum(optimal_team.cost)
    opt_evg = sum(optimal_team.expected_vg_points)

    print("""
**Total cost:** $(opt_cost) / 100 credits | **Expected VG points:** $(round(opt_evg, digits=1)) | **Budget remaining:** $(100 - opt_cost)

""")

    display_cols = [:rider, :team, :cost, :expected_vg_points, :selection_frequency, :strength, :uncertainty]
    display_cols = filter(c -> c in propertynames(optimal_team), display_cols)

    opt_display = optimal_team[:, display_cols]
    round_numeric_columns!(opt_display)
    clean_team_names!(opt_display, [:team])
    md_table(sort(opt_display, :expected_vg_points, rev=true))
    print("\n")
end
```

# Comparison

```{julia}
#| output: asis
if !prediction_ok
    print("*Skipped — prediction not available.*\n")
elseif nrow(my_selection) > 0 && nrow(optimal_team) > 0
    my_evg = sum(my_selection.expected_vg_points)
    opt_evg = sum(optimal_team.expected_vg_points)
    diff = my_evg - opt_evg
    pct_diff = round(100 * diff / opt_evg, digits=1)

    my_cost = sum(my_selection.cost)
    opt_cost = sum(optimal_team.cost)

    print("""
| Metric | Your team | Optimal team | Difference |
|--------|-----------|--------------|------------|
| Expected VG points | $(round(my_evg, digits=1)) | $(round(opt_evg, digits=1)) | $(round(diff, digits=1)) ($(pct_diff)%) |
| Total cost | $(my_cost) | $(opt_cost) | $(my_cost - opt_cost) |
| Budget remaining | $(100 - my_cost) | $(100 - opt_cost) | $(opt_cost - my_cost) |
| Riders | $(nrow(my_selection)) | $(nrow(optimal_team)) | |

""")

    # Show riders unique to each team
    my_riders = Set(my_selection.riderkey)
    opt_riders = Set(optimal_team.riderkey)
    shared = intersect(my_riders, opt_riders)
    only_mine = setdiff(my_riders, opt_riders)
    only_optimal = setdiff(opt_riders, my_riders)

    print("**Shared riders ($(length(shared))):** ")
    shared_names = filter(row -> row.riderkey in shared, predicted).rider
    print(join(sort(String.(shared_names)), ", "))
    print("\n\n")

    if !isempty(only_mine)
        print("**Only in your team ($(length(only_mine))):** ")
        mine_names = filter(row -> row.riderkey in only_mine, predicted).rider
        print(join(sort(String.(mine_names)), ", "))
        print("\n\n")
    end

    if !isempty(only_optimal)
        print("**Only in optimal team ($(length(only_optimal))):** ")
        opt_names = filter(row -> row.riderkey in only_optimal, predicted).rider
        print(join(sort(String.(opt_names)), ", "))
        print("\n\n")
    end

    # Swap analysis: for each rider in your team but not optimal, show what you'd gain by swapping
    if !isempty(only_mine) && !isempty(only_optimal)
        print("""
### Swap analysis

What you'd gain or lose by swapping each of your unique riders for their optimal counterpart, ordered by expected points.

""")
        my_unique = sort(filter(row -> row.riderkey in only_mine, predicted), :expected_vg_points, rev=true)
        opt_unique = sort(filter(row -> row.riderkey in only_optimal, predicted), :expected_vg_points, rev=true)

        print("| Your rider | Exp pts | Cost | Optimal rider | Exp pts | Cost |\n")
        print("|------------|---------|------|---------------|---------|------|\n")
        for i in 1:max(nrow(my_unique), nrow(opt_unique))
            my_name = i <= nrow(my_unique) ? my_unique[i, :rider] : ""
            my_pts = i <= nrow(my_unique) ? round(my_unique[i, :expected_vg_points], digits=1) : ""
            my_c = i <= nrow(my_unique) ? my_unique[i, :cost] : ""
            opt_name = i <= nrow(opt_unique) ? opt_unique[i, :rider] : ""
            opt_pts = i <= nrow(opt_unique) ? round(opt_unique[i, :expected_vg_points], digits=1) : ""
            opt_c = i <= nrow(opt_unique) ? opt_unique[i, :cost] : ""
            print("| $my_name | $my_pts | $my_c | $opt_name | $opt_pts | $opt_c |\n")
        end
        print("\n")
    end
end
```

# Retrospective (after the race)

Set `vg_race_number` to the VG race number (from races.php) once the race has been run. Leave at `0` to auto-detect from the race name, or `-1` to skip this section entirely.

```{julia}
#| echo: true
#| output: false
vg_race_number = 0  # 0 = auto-detect, -1 = skip, or set manually (e.g. 3)
```

```{julia}
#| output: asis

if !prediction_ok
    print("""
::: {.callout-warning}
Retrospective analysis unavailable — prediction failed. Fix the race configuration above first.
:::
""")
elseif vg_race_number == -1
    print("""
::: {.callout-note}
Retrospective analysis skipped. Set `vg_race_number` to enable after the race.
:::
""")
else
    # Auto-detect race number if needed
    actual_race_number = vg_race_number
    if actual_race_number == 0
        try
            vg_racelist = suppress_output() do
                getvgracelist(race_year; cache_config=race_cache)
            end
            race_info = find_race(race_name)
            detected = match_vg_race_number(
                race_info !== nothing ? race_info.name : race_name,
                vg_racelist
            )
            if detected !== nothing
                actual_race_number = detected
            end
        catch e
            @warn "Auto-detection failed: $e"
        end
    end

    if actual_race_number <= 0
        print("""
::: {.callout-warning}
Could not auto-detect VG race number. Set `vg_race_number` manually.
:::
""")
    else
        # Fetch actual VG results
        actual_results = nothing
        try
            actual_results = suppress_output() do
                getvgraceresults(race_year, actual_race_number; cache_config=race_cache)
            end
        catch e
            @warn "Failed to fetch VG race results: $e"
        end

        # Archive results for prospective evaluation
        if !isempty(config.pcs_slug)
            try
                suppress_output() do
                    archive_race_results(config.pcs_slug, config.year;
                        vg_race_number=actual_race_number, cache_config=race_cache)
                end
            catch e
                @warn "Failed to archive race results: $e"
            end
        end

        if actual_results === nothing || nrow(actual_results) == 0
            print("""
::: {.callout-note}
No results available yet for race $(actual_race_number). Re-render after the race finishes.
:::
""")
        else
            # Fetch full VG rider list (all riders with costs, no startlist filter)
            all_vg_riders = suppress_output() do
                getvgriders(config.current_url; cache_config=race_cache)
            end

            # Build full retrospective pool: all VG riders, left-joined with actual scores
            # (riders who scored 0 get actual_vg_points = 0)
            retro = leftjoin(
                all_vg_riders[:, [:rider, :team, :cost, :riderkey]],
                actual_results[:, [:riderkey, :score]],
                on=:riderkey
            )
            retro[!, :actual_vg_points] = coalesce.(retro.score, 0)
            select!(retro, Not(:score))

            # Left-join expected points from prediction (where available)
            if prediction_ok
                pred_cols = [:riderkey, :expected_vg_points, :strength]
                pred_cols = filter(c -> c in propertynames(predicted), pred_cols)
                retro = leftjoin(retro, predicted[:, pred_cols], on=:riderkey, makeunique=true)
            else
                retro[!, :expected_vg_points] .= missing
                retro[!, :strength] .= missing
            end

            # --- PIT values (computed early for use in summary and later sections) ---
            pit_values = if sim_vg_points !== nothing && size(sim_vg_points, 1) > 0
                compute_pit_values(predicted, sim_vg_points, retro)
            else
                DataFrame()
            end

            # --- Your team's actual performance ---
            my_retro = filter(row -> row.riderkey in my_keys, retro)
            model_retro = if prediction_ok && nrow(optimal_team) > 0
                filter(row -> row.riderkey in Set(optimal_team.riderkey), retro)
            else
                DataFrame()
            end

            # --- Hindsight-optimal team ---
            hindsight_sol = build_model_oneday(retro, 6, :actual_vg_points, :cost; totalcost=100)
            hindsight_team = if hindsight_sol !== nothing
                filter(row -> hindsight_sol[row.riderkey] > 0.5, retro)
            else
                DataFrame()
            end

            # --- Summary comparison ---
            my_actual = nrow(my_retro) > 0 ? sum(my_retro.actual_vg_points) : 0
            model_actual = nrow(model_retro) > 0 ? sum(model_retro.actual_vg_points) : 0
            hindsight_actual = nrow(hindsight_team) > 0 ? sum(hindsight_team.actual_vg_points) : 0

            sum_or_na(df, col) = nrow(df) > 0 && col in propertynames(df) && any(!ismissing, df[!, col]) ?
                                 round(sum(skipmissing(df[!, col])), digits=1) : "—"

            my_pcr = hindsight_actual > 0 ? round(100 * my_actual / hindsight_actual, digits=1) : 0.0
            model_pcr = hindsight_actual > 0 && model_actual > 0 ?
                        round(100 * model_actual / hindsight_actual, digits=1) : "—"

            print("""
## Summary

| Metric | Your team | Model's team | Hindsight optimal |
|--------|-----------|--------------|-------------------|
| Actual VG points | $(my_actual) | $(model_actual > 0 ? model_actual : "—") | $(hindsight_actual) |
| Expected VG points | $(sum_or_na(my_retro, :expected_vg_points)) | $(sum_or_na(model_retro, :expected_vg_points)) | — |
| Points captured | $(my_pcr)% | $(model_pcr isa Number ? "$(model_pcr)%" : model_pcr) | 100% |
| Total cost | $(nrow(my_retro) > 0 ? sum(my_retro.cost) : "—") | $(nrow(model_retro) > 0 ? sum(model_retro.cost) : "—") | $(nrow(hindsight_team) > 0 ? sum(hindsight_team.cost) : "—") |

""")

            # --- Model calibration summary ---
            if nrow(pit_values) > 0
                scored_pv = filter(:scored => identity, pit_values)
                if nrow(scored_pv) > 0
                    mean_pit = round(mean(scored_pv.pit_value), digits=2)
                    unc_lo, unc_hi = round.(extrema(predicted.uncertainty), digits=2)
                    label = mean_pit > 0.6 ? "underestimates scoring riders" : mean_pit < 0.4 ? "overestimates scoring riders" : "well-calibrated"
                    print("""
**Model calibration:** uncertainty range $(unc_lo)–$(unc_hi) | mean PIT (scoring riders) = $(mean_pit) | $(label)

""")
                end
            end

            # --- Per-rider detail for each team ---
            retro_cols = [:rider, :team, :cost, :actual_vg_points]
            if :expected_vg_points in propertynames(retro)
                push!(retro_cols, :expected_vg_points)
            end
            if :strength in propertynames(retro)
                push!(retro_cols, :strength)
            end

            print("## Your team\n\n")
            if nrow(my_retro) > 0
                my_retro_display = sort(my_retro[:, retro_cols], :actual_vg_points, rev=true)
                round_numeric_columns!(my_retro_display)
                clean_team_names!(my_retro_display, [:team])
                md_table(my_retro_display)
                print("\n\n")
            else
                print("No riders matched to results.\n\n")
            end

            print("## Model's team\n\n")
            if nrow(model_retro) > 0
                model_retro_display = sort(model_retro[:, retro_cols], :actual_vg_points, rev=true)
                round_numeric_columns!(model_retro_display)
                clean_team_names!(model_retro_display, [:team])
                md_table(model_retro_display)
                print("\n\n")
            else
                print("No model team available.\n\n")
            end

            print("## Hindsight-optimal team\n\n")
            if nrow(hindsight_team) > 0
                hs_display = sort(hindsight_team[:, retro_cols], :actual_vg_points, rev=true)
                round_numeric_columns!(hs_display)
                clean_team_names!(hs_display, [:team])
                md_table(hs_display)
                print("\n\n")
            end

            # --- Distribution charts (only if sim draws available) ---
            if sim_vg_points !== nothing && size(sim_vg_points, 1) > 0
                print("""
## Simulated points distributions

Box plots show the distribution of VG points across $(size(sim_vg_points, 2)) resampled race simulations. Red diamonds mark actual results.

""")
                for (team_label, team_retro) in [
                    ("Your team", my_retro),
                    ("Model's team", model_retro),
                    ("Hindsight-optimal team", hindsight_team),
                ]
                    nrow(team_retro) == 0 && continue
                    # Ensure expected_vg_points exists for sorting (coalesce missings)
                    plot_df = copy(team_retro)
                    if :expected_vg_points ∉ propertynames(plot_df)
                        plot_df[!, :expected_vg_points] .= 0.0
                    else
                        plot_df[!, :expected_vg_points] = coalesce.(plot_df.expected_vg_points, 0.0)
                    end
                    print(sim_distribution_chart(
                        plot_df, predicted, sim_vg_points;
                        actual_results=team_retro,
                        title=team_label
                    ))
                    print("\n\n")
                end
            end

            # --- PIT calibration histogram (only if sim draws available) ---
            if nrow(pit_values) > 0
                scored_pit = filter(:scored => identity, pit_values)
                zero_pit = filter(:scored => !, pit_values)
                n_scored = nrow(scored_pit)
                n_zero = nrow(zero_pit)

                # Predicted vs actual zero-score proportion
                n_total = nrow(pit_values)
                actual_zero_pct = round(100 * n_zero / n_total, digits=1)
                # Average predicted probability of scoring zero
                pred_zero_pct = if n_total > 0
                    key_to_idx = Dict(predicted.riderkey[i] => i for i in 1:nrow(predicted))
                    pred_zeros = Float64[]
                    for row in eachrow(pit_values)
                        idx = get(key_to_idx, row.riderkey, nothing)
                        idx === nothing && continue
                        draws = @view sim_vg_points[idx, :]
                        push!(pred_zeros, count(==(0.0), draws) / length(draws))
                    end
                    round(100 * mean(pred_zeros), digits=1)
                else
                    0.0
                end

                print("""
## VG points calibration

The PIT (probability integral transform) histogram checks whether the model's VG points distributions are well-calibrated. If calibrated, the histogram should be approximately uniform. Skewed right means the model underestimates; skewed left means it overestimates.

**Zero-score calibration:** $(actual_zero_pct)% of riders actually scored zero vs $(pred_zero_pct)% predicted to score zero (average across riders).

""")
                if n_scored > 0
                    print(pit_histogram_chart(pit_values;
                        title="PIT calibration — $(config.name) $(config.year)"))
                    print("\n\n")
                end

                # --- Team total distribution charts ---
                print("""
## Team total distributions

Histograms of simulated total VG points for each team, with the actual total marked. The percentile indicates where the actual outcome falls within the simulated distribution.

""")
                for (team_label, team_retro) in [
                    ("Your team", my_retro),
                    ("Model's team", model_retro),
                    ("Hindsight-optimal team", hindsight_team),
                ]
                    nrow(team_retro) == 0 && continue
                    team_keys = String.(team_retro.riderkey)
                    actual_total = Float64(sum(team_retro.actual_vg_points))
                    print(team_total_distribution_chart(
                        team_keys, predicted, sim_vg_points;
                        actual_total=actual_total,
                        title=team_label
                    ))
                    print("\n\n")
                end
            end

            # --- Prediction misses (only if predictions available) ---
            retro_with_preds = filter(row -> !ismissing(row.expected_vg_points), retro)
            if nrow(retro_with_preds) > 0
                retro_with_preds[!, :prediction_error] = retro_with_preds.actual_vg_points .- retro_with_preds.expected_vg_points
                retro_sorted = sort(retro_with_preds, :prediction_error, rev=true)

                print("""
## Prediction misses

Riders where actual VG points differed most from expected, highlighting model blind spots.

### Underestimated (actual > expected)

""")
                top_under = first(retro_sorted, min(10, nrow(retro_sorted)))
                top_under = filter(row -> row.prediction_error > 0, top_under)
                if nrow(top_under) > 0
                    under_display = top_under[:, [:rider, :team, :cost, :expected_vg_points, :actual_vg_points, :prediction_error]]
                    round_numeric_columns!(under_display)
                    clean_team_names!(under_display, [:team])
                    md_table(under_display)
                    print("\n\n")
                else
                    print("No significant underestimates.\n\n")
                end

                print("### Overestimated (expected > actual)\n\n")
                top_over = last(retro_sorted, min(10, nrow(retro_sorted)))
                top_over = filter(row -> row.prediction_error < 0, top_over)
                top_over = sort(top_over, :prediction_error)
                if nrow(top_over) > 0
                    over_display = top_over[:, [:rider, :team, :cost, :expected_vg_points, :actual_vg_points, :prediction_error]]
                    round_numeric_columns!(over_display)
                    clean_team_names!(over_display, [:team])
                    md_table(over_display)
                    print("\n")
                else
                    print("No significant overestimates.\n")
                end
            end

            # --- Selection misses (team-selection-framed) ---
            if :expected_vg_points in propertynames(retro) && any(!ismissing, retro.expected_vg_points)
                retro_evp = filter(row -> !ismissing(row.expected_vg_points), retro)

                # Costly misses: high-EVP riders who scored zero
                evp_threshold = sort(retro_evp, :expected_vg_points, rev=true)
                top_predicted = if :selection_frequency in propertynames(predicted)
                    sel_keys = Set(filter(row -> row.selection_frequency > 0.1, predicted).riderkey)
                    evp_keys = Set(first(evp_threshold, min(15, nrow(evp_threshold))).riderkey)
                    filter(row -> row.riderkey in union(sel_keys, evp_keys), retro_evp)
                else
                    first(evp_threshold, min(15, nrow(evp_threshold)))
                end
                costly = filter(row -> row.actual_vg_points == 0, top_predicted)

                # Cheap value missed: cost ≤ 12 riders who scored above field median
                scoring_riders = filter(row -> row.actual_vg_points > 0, retro)
                median_score = nrow(scoring_riders) > 0 ? median(scoring_riders.actual_vg_points) : 0.0
                cheap_value = filter(row -> row.cost <= 12 && row.actual_vg_points > median_score, retro_evp)

                if nrow(costly) > 0 || nrow(cheap_value) > 0
                    print("""
## Selection misses

""")
                end

                if nrow(costly) > 0
                    print("### Costly misses\n\nHighly rated riders who scored zero — these are the picks that destroy team performance.\n\n")
                    costly_display = sort(costly[:, [:rider, :team, :cost, :expected_vg_points, :actual_vg_points]], :expected_vg_points, rev=true)
                    round_numeric_columns!(costly_display)
                    clean_team_names!(costly_display, [:team])
                    md_table(costly_display)
                    print("\n\n")
                end

                if nrow(cheap_value) > 0
                    print("### Cheap value missed\n\nRiders costing ≤ 12 credits who scored above the field median ($(round(median_score, digits=0)) pts) — bargains the model failed to identify.\n\n")
                    cheap_display = sort(cheap_value[:, [:rider, :team, :cost, :expected_vg_points, :actual_vg_points]], :actual_vg_points, rev=true)
                    round_numeric_columns!(cheap_display)
                    clean_team_names!(cheap_display, [:team])
                    md_table(cheap_display)
                    print("\n\n")
                end
            end

            # --- Breakaway contribution audit ---
            if !isempty(b_rates)
                predicted_break_pts = sum(b_rates .* b_sectors) * scoring.breakaway_points
                n_break_riders = count(>(0.0), b_rates)
                max_per_rider = 4 * scoring.breakaway_points
                print("""
## Breakaway audit

The model assigned breakaway rates to **$(n_break_riders)** riders (of $(nrow(predicted))). Predicted total breakaway contribution per simulation: **$(round(predicted_break_pts, digits=0))** points across the field. Maximum possible per rider in the break: $(max_per_rider) points (4 sectors × $(scoring.breakaway_points) pts/sector).

""")
            else
                print("""
## Breakaway audit

No PCS breakaway data was available for this race. The simulation used only the position-based heuristic for breakaway points, which may underestimate contributions in races with long breakaways.

""")
            end

            # --- Prospective model evaluation ---
            if !isempty(config.pcs_slug)
                prosp = evaluate_prospective(config.pcs_slug, config.year)
                if prosp !== nothing
                    print("""
## Model evaluation

Comparing archived pre-race predictions against actual PCS results.

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Matched riders | $(prosp.n_matched) |
| Spearman rho | $(round(prosp.spearman_rho, digits=3)) |
| Top-5 overlap | $(prosp.top5_overlap) / 5 |
| Top-10 overlap | $(prosp.top10_overlap) / 10 |
| Mean abs rank error | $(round(prosp.mean_abs_rank_error, digits=1)) |

""")
                end
            end
        end
    end
end
```
